Our Passion for Cats

We are dedicated to raising exceptional Persian kittens with gentle temperaments, luxurious coats, and loving personalities.

View Kittens Learn More

Our Story

A Lifelong Love for Persians

Our journey began with a single Persian kitten and a dream to share the breed's beauty and grace with others. Over the years, we have built a cattery known for ethical breeding, health-focused practices, and a commitment to the well-being of every cat and kitten in our care.

"Each kitten is raised as a cherished family member—until they become part of yours."

Cattery Founder
Learn More
Health-First Breeding

We prioritize genetic screening, PKD testing, and veterinary oversight to ensure every kitten starts life healthy and strong.

Lifetime Cattery Support

We offer guidance, resources, and a lifelong commitment to every kitten and family we serve.

Our Core Values

What Guides Every Kitten We Raise
Gentle Socialization

Kittens are raised with daily affection and positive human interaction.

Health & Wellness

We ensure top-tier veterinary care and health checks from day one.

Ethical Breeding

We uphold the highest standards of responsible, ethical breeding.

Lifelong Support

Our relationship continues long after adoption—we're here for life.

Transparency

Open communication and honest updates at every stage.

Enrichment

Kittens are exposed to toys, play, and routines for confident development.

Our Cattery

Designed for Comfort, Safety, and Enrichment

Home-Like Spaces

Kittens are raised in warm, home-like settings - so they grow up confident and social.

Learn more

Health & Safety

Clean, controlled environments maintained with veterinary-approved hygiene practices.

Learn more

Play & Enrichment

Safe indoor and outdoor play areas encourage healthy exercise and natural curiosity.

Learn more

Socialization

Daily gentle handling and sensory exposure help kittens become emotionally balanced.

Learn more
Testimonials

Stories from Persian cat lovers who’ve welcomed our kittens into their families.

"Our kitten is very sweet and also well-adjusted. The breeder's support made a lot of difference. Great experience!"

Jane Smith

Austin, TX

"We really loved the regular updates and photos. Our Persian cat is the perfect addition to our happy family!"

Nguyen Minh

San Diego, CA

"Our kitten arrived very healthy, playful, and clearly well-loved. We couldn't have asked for a better experience!"

Jack Smith

Atlanta, GA

Stay Connected With Us

Subscribe to our newsletter for updates on upcoming litters, care tips, and stories from our family — straight to your inbox.

We send only what matters. No spam, ever.

Raising happy, healthy kittens with love and care.
